productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Impel Leather White Sports Shoe
description: Dear walk lovers, here's that comfy walking shoe you've been looking for! The nike Impel Leather shoe comes in a low profile silhouette with a Rolling Rail feature that offers a stable ride, making your walks all the more enjoyable. Upper Leather and synthetic combination upper with perforations for breathable comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Cushioned tongue and collar for a snug comfort nike Walk footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole with an encapsulated Air Sole unit in the heel that is visible from the outsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfort Nike Rolling Rail technology to offer a stable heel to toe transition Outsole TPR outsole with strategically placed lugs and phylon max flex grooves for optimum grip, traction and easy movement Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
